member.name: T:Sandbox.AI.Default.IActionState
member.summary: A movement state (walk, find a cover, etc.)

member.name: T:Sandbox.AI.Default.ICombatState
member.summary: A state for combat (shoot, reload, etc.)

member.name: P:Sandbox.AI.Default.SbokuParent.SquaredDistanceToTarget
member.summary: Get squared distance to target. If turget is null, we'll get NRE.

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.IsOffline
member.summary: If true, the bot won't make any new decisions

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.BurstPeriod
member.summary: The duration of a single firing burst.

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.AimSpeed
member.summary: The duration of a single firing burst.

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.Destination
member.summary: A point in space the bot is navigating toward

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.Target
member.summary: Target the bot must attack

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.Weapon
member.summary: Active weapon of the bot

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.HeightToAimAt
member.summary: Height bots will aim at

member.name: P:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.IsReloading
member.summary: You must set it to true to reload and then manually unset. This way is more robust due to the way SWB works.

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.Move(Vector3)
member.summary: Try to move in the direction given by the wishVelocity unit vector

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.Rotate(System.Single)
member.summary: Set rotation based on the yaw

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.MoveTo(Vector3)
member.summary: Navigate to the position

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.MoveTo(System.Collections.Generic.List{Vector3})
member.summary: Navigate to the position given the path.

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuBase.StopNavigating
member.summary: Stop moving to the point, given by the MoveTo methods

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.SbokuSettings.CreateOrFind(Sandbox.Scene)
member.summary: Use it once per component

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.TimerHelper.Every(System.Single,System.Action)
member.summary: Runs action every given period of time in seconds

member.name: M:Sandbox.Sboku.TimerHelper.Remove(System.Object)
member.summary: This method allows you to remove an action from the timer by utilizing the handler previously retrieved through the TimerHelper.

member.name: M:Sandbox.Shared.ISbokuCondition.IsTerminal
member.summary: Should we stop evaluating other conditions if the condition is true

member.name: T:Sandbox.Shared.ISbokuState
member.summary: General interface for any state
